headlines.title: Japanese Yen: Under pressure as USD eyes 160.50 – Societe Generale
Stocks climb, dollar near six-week high amid Iran talks uncertainty
Stock market today: Japan’s Nikkei, Wall Street futures rise as dollar hovers near six-week high amid U.S.-Iran talks
Japan and Philippines to start talks on intelligence-sharing pact
Asian Stocks Strengthen Across the Board. Japan and South Korea Stocks Near Record Highs, US $2 Billion Injection Ignites Quantum Computing Concept Stocks
Japanese Yen: Energy and rates keep Yen under pressure – Commerzbank
Japan's Nikkei rallies to record close as AI shares shine

marketTone.ko: 일본 증시는 AI 관련주 강세에 힘입어 닛케이 지수가 사상 최고치로 마감하는 등 견조한 상승세를 보였습니다. 아시아 증시 전반의 강세 속에서 일본과 한국 증시가 사상 최고치에 근접했으며, 양자 컴퓨팅 관련주도 대규모 투자 소식에 주목받았습니다. 반면 엔화는 에너지 가격 및 금리 차이 등의 요인으로 달러 대비 약세를 지속하며, 달러는 6주래 최고치 부근에서 거래되었습니다. 한편, 미국-이란 회담 불확실성도 시장의 배경 요인으로 언급되었습니다.
marketTone.en: Japanese stocks showed strong performance today, with the Nikkei rallying to a record close, primarily driven by the robust performance of AI-related shares and broader Asian market strength. Quantum computing concept stocks also gained attention following a significant US investment. Conversely, the Japanese Yen remained under significant pressure, weakening against the dollar which hovered near a six-week high, attributed to factors like energy prices and interest rate differentials. Market sentiment also noted uncertainty surrounding U.S.-Iran talks as a background factor.
